metadata.title: What's Going On
metadata.lyrics:
[00:13.24] Mother, mother
[00:16.51] There's too many of you crying
[00:22.90] And brother, brother, brother
[00:27.31] There's far too many of you dying
[00:34.02] You know you've got to find a way
[00:40.03] To bring back love here today
[00:46.86] 
[00:50.79] Father, father
[00:54.28] There's no need to escalate
[00:59.47] Listen, war is not the answer
[01:03.65] For only love can conquer hate
[01:08.70] You know we've got to find a way
[01:13.63] To bring back love back here today
[01:19.84] Picket lines and picket signs
[01:24.36] Don't punish me with brutality
[01:29.19] And just talk to me, so you can see
[01:33.08] Oh, what's going on, what's going on
[01:38.80] What's going on, what's going on
[01:44.25] 
[02:13.09] Mother, mother
[02:16.66] Every body thinks we're wrong
[02:22.84] Oh, who are they to judge us
[02:26.29] Just because our hair is long
[02:31.29] You know we've got to find a way
[02:36.03] To bring back understanding today
[02:43.52] 
[02:51.70] You know we've got to find a way
[03:05.16] And bring back some love back here today
[03:11.29] Picket lines and picket signs
[03:15.87] Don't punish me with brutality
[03:20.59] And just talk to me, so you can see
[03:25.24] Oh, what's going on, what's going on
[03:32.70] What's going on, I tell you what's going on
[03:55.61] Oh, what's going on, what's going on
[04:01.89] What's going on, what's going on
[04:12.20] 
[04:15.81] Mother, mother
[04:18.73] Father, father
[04:26.31] 
[04:29.80] Good God
[04:31.00]
